atan2.description:
The Arc tangent 2 function returns the angle in radians between the 2D vector Vector and the horizontal. (No need to switch x and y as in the usual atan2 function.)
It is the reciprocal of the Cartesian function

unique_filter_output.description:
The Arc tangent 2 function returns the angle in radians between the 2D vector Vector and the horizontal. (No need to switch x and y as in the usual atan2 function.)
It is the reciprocal of the Cartesian function

ports_evidence.notes: Function atomic ports are copied from the source atomic node definition dump.

tips.summary: Returns the arc tan 2 value of a vector2 entry: arctan2(xa, ya)

cartesian.description:
The Cartesian function converts polar coordinates to Cartesian coordinates. (Polar coordinates are a distance from the origin and an angle in radians from the horizontal.)
It is the reciprocal of the Arc tangent 2 function: Length × Float2(cos(Angle), sin(Angle))

unique_filter_output.description:
The Cartesian function converts polar coordinates to Cartesian coordinates. (Polar coordinates are a distance from the origin and an angle in radians from the horizontal.)
It is the reciprocal of the Arc tangent 2 function: Length × Float2(cos(Angle), sin(Angle))

ports_evidence.notes: Function atomic ports are copied from the source atomic node definition dump.

tips.summary: Converts 2 polar coordinates to cartesian coordinates: carth(rho, theta)

while.description:
The While loop node will execute the Init branch once, then iterate over the Exit cond. and Loop body branches until the Exit cond. branch returns true
Nodes connected to the Exit cond. and Loop body branches cannot be connected to other branches of the graph.
Loops have an implicit maximum number of iterations which can be disabled by setting it to -1.

unique_filter_output.description:
The While loop node will execute the Init branch once, then iterate over the Exit cond. and Loop body branches until the Exit cond. branch returns true
Nodes connected to the Exit cond. and Loop body branches cannot be connected to other branches of the graph.
Loops have an implicit maximum number of iterations which can be disabled by setting it to -1.

ports_evidence.notes: Function atomic ports are copied from the source atomic node definition dump.
